name: MAG X870E GAMING MAX WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C (DP1.4 Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (MAXX870EGAMAXWIFI)
shortName: MAG X870E GAMING MAX WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: High-end AM5 socket motherboard with PCIe 5.0 support, Wi-Fi 7, and DDR5-8200 overclocking capability for gaming.
